subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor triggers 692721536/221214610 and 692713692/221214520 are not GRBs
body:
J. Wood (NASA/MSFC) and J. Mangan (UCD) report on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) triggers 692721536/221214610 at 14:38:51 UT
and 692713692/221214520 at 12:28:07.34 UT on 14 December 2022, tentatively classified as GRBs, 
are in fact not due to GRBs. These triggers are likely due to M-Class solar flares."
